prompt: A full-body anime character illustration of a cyberpunk elf girl standing alone against a clean plain white background, centered and facing slightly left in a relaxed neutral pose with both arms hanging naturally. She has a short bob haircut in icy light blue, straight blunt bangs, pale skin, large pointed elf ears, and vivid glowing red-orange eyes with a calm, slightly serious expression. Her design blends fantasy and futuristic biomechanics: she wears 1 oversized white techwear hooded jacket with black lining, black straps, zipper details, and red warning-style markings on the sleeve; underneath is 1 glossy black biomechanical bodysuit with exposed cutout sections, cables, segmented armor plates, and intricate hard-surface cybernetic detailing around the torso and hips. She has 1 strapped black thigh pouch on her right thigh, 2 mechanical knee braces with visible circular joints, 2 external cables running from the knees downward, and 1 pair of chunky black combat boots with thick soles, buckles, and subtle red accents. Add small black earrings and tiny industrial accessories around the ears. Render in highly detailed polished manga-style line art with crisp edges, delicate cel shading, glossy highlights on the skin and latex-like surfaces, subtle red accent lights, and an overall premium sci-fi character concept art look. Keep the figure fully visible from head to boots with generous negative space and no props, scenery, text, or shadows beyond minimal grounding.
